import re, unicodedata, math, difflib, json, numpy as np, pandas as pd

AR_DIACRITICS = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')
TATWEEL = '\u0640'
PUNCT = re.compile(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]+', re.UNICODE)

def normalize_ar(text):
    if text is None:
        return ''
    # unify arabic letters: alef forms, hamza, yaa/yaa maksura, ta marbuta
    text = text.replace(TATWEEL, '')
    text = AR_DIACRITICS.sub('', text)
    # Normalize alef variants
    text = re.sub('[\u0622\u0623\u0625]', 'ا', text)
    # Normalize taa marbuta to ha? Keep ta marbuta normalized to ه or ة? For search we can map to ه or ة? We'll map to ه to unify
    text = text.replace('ة', 'ه')
    # Normalize alif maqsura to ya
    text = text.replace('ى', 'ي')
    # normalize hamza on waw/ya?
    # We can map various hamza forms to bare hamza?
    # Already we replaced alef with hamza to alef, but half
    # Remove punctuation
    text = PUNCT.sub(' ', text)
    # collapse whitespace
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text).strip().lower()
    return text

def lcs_length(a, b):
    # Compute LCS length for tokens? We'll do char-level LCS length using dynamic programming if not too big
    n, m = len(a), len(b)
    # to avoid heavy cost if strings large, we can use difflib instead
    sm = difflib.SequenceMatcher(None, a, b)
    return sum(tr.size for tr in sm.get_matching_blocks())

def similarity(a, b):
    na, nb = normalize_ar(a), normalize_ar(b)
    if not na or not nb:
        return 0.0
    lcs = lcs_length(na, nb)
    return lcs / max(len(na), len(nb))

def token_f1(a, b):
    na, nb = normalize_ar(a), normalize_ar(b)
    sa = set(na.split())
    sb = set(nb.split())
    if not sa or not sb:
        return 0.0
    inter = len(sa & sb)
    prec = inter / len(sa)
    rec = inter / len(sb)
    if (prec + rec) == 0:
        f1 = 0.0
    else:
        f1 = 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)
    return f1, prec, rec, inter, len(sa), len(sb)

key_terms_norm

def get_text(h):
    txt = (h.get('Matn') or '') + ' ' + (h.get('hadithTxt') or '')
    return txt

def search_hadith_substring(term_norm):
    res = []
    for h in hadith:
        txt = get_text(h)
        n = normalize_ar(txt)
        if term_norm in n:
            res.append(h)
    return res

# Search for "النواقص"

len(results)

span_full = "أَلاَ تَرَوْنَ أَنَّ اللَّهَ يُحِبُّ مِنْكُمُ التَصَدُّقَ فَإِنْ أَرَدتُمُ أَنْ تُصَدِّقُوا فَلا تَصَدُّقُوا بِالنَواقِصِ"
norm_span = normalize_ar(span_full)

def hadith_text_norm(h):
    txt = get_text(h)
    return normalize_ar(txt)

scores = []
for h in hadith:
    n = hadith_text_norm(h)
    if not n:
        continue
    # compute SequenceMatcher ratio
    sm = difflib.SequenceMatcher(None, norm_span, n)
    ratio = sm.ratio()
    # also compute token F1
    f1, prec, rec, inter, lena, lenb = token_f1(norm_span, n)
    # compute lcs ratio
    lcs = lcs_length(norm_span, n)/max(len(norm_span), len(n))
    scores.append((ratio, f1, lcs, h['hadithID'], n[:200], get_text(h)[:200]))
    
# get top by ratio or f1 or lcs
top_ratio = sorted(scores, key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)[:10]
top_f1 = sorted(scores, key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)[:10]
top_lcs = sorted(scores, key=lambda x: x[2], reverse=True)[:10]
top_ratio[:3], top_f1[:3], top_lcs[:3]

def find_by_terms(terms, corpus, get_txt):
    res=[]
    for item in corpus:
        txt = get_txt(item)
        n = normalize_ar(txt)
        if all(normalize_ar(t) in n for t in terms):
            res.append(item)
    return res
